headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Underweight on Automatic Data Processing, Lowers Price Target to $214
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Kupferberg   maintains Automatic Data Processing (NASDAQ:ADP) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $262 to $214.
